Transcrição Completa: 18 I am Looking at Other Service Providers
[00:00] Uh, next objection. I have some other ex that I'm looking at, too. Um, I'm going to get back to you after I talk with them.
[00:08] Hey, that's great. Just to be clear, out of everything I've covered today, was there anything else that you needed clarity on that would help you in your pursuit of getting these results that you're after?
[00:19] 📊 SLIDE DETECTADO
─────────────────────────────
TEXTO: "Professional Shopping Response"
NÚMEROS: Não especificados numericamente
VISUAL: Resposta profissional para comparação de fornecedores, postura de confiança vs desespero
[00:21] Uh, hey, I, you know, I've got some other people that I'm also going to talk to about this. I'm going to get back to you after I talk with them.
[00:29] Hey, that sounds fair. If anything comes up or you have any questions in the meantime, feel free to let me know.
[00:35] We're excited to do the deal with you. And I hope everything I've covered today is everything that you need in order to get these results.
[00:43] I'm going to shoot you a follow-up email that goes through everything that we've talked about today.
[00:48] And I look forward to talking with you later this week.
[00:51] 📊 SLIDE DETECTADO
─────────────────────────────
TEXTO: "Follow-up Scheduling Strategy"
NÚMEROS: Não especificados numericamente
VISUAL: Opções de agendamento: agora vs depois de falar com outros fornecedores, estratégia de follow-up estruturado
[00:53] Do you want to set a follow-up time now or would you prefer to me follow up with you and get a scheduled call after you talk to these other people?
[01:01] You know, try to get a follow-up call scheduled if you can because in fairness, it's totally fine for them to shop around.
[01:08] 📊 SLIDE DETECTADO
─────────────────────────────
TEXTO: "Want vs Need Deal Philosophy"
NÚMEROS: Não especificados numericamente
VISUAL: Mentalidade de vendedor: querer o negócio mas não precisar, evitar desespero, confiança profissional
[01:10] There's this good perspective you want to have as a salesperson. You want the deal, but you don't need the deal.
[01:16] There's a level of desperation that sometimes comes out if somebody can't close a call, like close the sale on that very call.
[01:23] 📊 SLIDE DETECTADO
─────────────────────────────
TEXTO: "High Ticket Sales Reality"
NÚMEROS: Não especificados numericamente
VISUAL: Realidade de vendas high ticket: raramente fecham na primeira call, follow-ups são onde acontecem as vendas
[01:25] From my experience, high ticket sales typically don't happen like on the very first call, especially. They typically happen on the follow-up calls.
[01:33] It's a okay if somebody's going to shop around. If you've done a good enough job and you're working with a good enough company, they will come back to you and they will close that deal if you've been articulate enough to show them why they should.
[01:45] 📊 SLIDE DETECTADO
─────────────────────────────
TEXTO: "Follow-up Process Summary"
NÚMEROS: Não especificados numericamente
VISUAL: Processo de follow-up completo: revisão de tudo, agendamento de call, email de acompanhamento
[01:47] So, to be clear, go over everything with them. Try to get a follow-up call scheduled and send a follow-up email reviewing everything that you just talked about on that call.
[01:56] Want the deal but don't need the deal.
